description: When editing a drum kit part, show each instrument's Output Assign (PART / COMP+EQ 1-6). This is part of future drum kit editing but the output assign is needed to make Comp+EQ useful. Could be a minimal column in the instrument list.

comments.text: Superseded by i7-1se.2 under the new output routing epic i7-1se

title: Add per-instrument output assign to drum kit view
